title: Shape Burglar
short_description: Help Marcel the polite raccoon burglar steal ONLY the shape on his wanted poster — wrong shapes set off his own alarm.
description: Marcel is a very polite burglar who only steals objects of the EXACT shape on his wanted poster. Tap the right shape to pull off each heist — tap the wrong one and he sets off his own alarm and hides in the lampshade, devastated. Grade bands ramp from naming circles, squares and triangles, to counting sides and corners of pentagons and octagons, to 3D solids and their faces (cube vs cuboid, cone vs cylinder). A free online geometry and shapes game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the shape shown on the wanted poster.
